en.title: Frequently Asked Questions
en.noResults: No results found. Try a different search term or filter.
en.aboutBody: On this page, you can find all the FAQs for the Vesalius.ai platform. If you can't find your answer, you can always contact us through the contact form.

items.question: How do I customise my output?
items.excerpt: What is an output template...

heroImage.alt: How do I customise my output?

items.body:
What is an output template?

Output templates let you define exactly what Vesalius AI generates after a patient interaction. You configure the structure, content, and timing — and the system handles the rest.

Once configured, every interaction automatically produces the right output at the right moment.

Important: multiple templates can be active at the same time and work fully independently of each other. A referral letter and a consultation note can be generated simultaneously without any conflict.

How do I set this up?

Go to Settings → Interactions → Output.

Step 1 – Create a new template
  1. Click the + New Template button

Step 2 – Give your template a name
  1. Choose a clear, descriptive name that reflects the purpose of the output

Example: Letter to the Referring Physician

Step 3 – Choose a trigger
  1. Set when this template should automatically fire. There are 4 options:
  • None — not automatic, only triggered manually
  • After conversation — fires once the patient conversation is finished
  • After consultation — fires after you finish a consultation via the speech-to-text module
  • After conversation and consultation — fires only when both are completed
Step 4 – Describe the purpose of the template
  1. Write a short description of what this template is for

Example: This template is used to generate the referral letter to the referring physician.

Step 5 – Define the output format

This is the most important step. Here you describe the structure and content of your output.

  1. Write out the desired structure in the text field
  2. Use placeholders to insert dynamic patient data. Write them using double curly braces: {{example}}

Examples:

  • {{patient name}}
  • {{date of consultation}}
  • {{referring physician}}

You can also use placeholders inside running text or lists:

The patient {{patient name}} was seen on {{date of consultation}} for...

For example:

Dear Dr. {{name referring physician}},

I am writing to inform you about your patient {{patient name}}, born on {{date of birth}}, who was seen at our clinic on {{date of consultation}} by {{treating physician}}.

Reason for referral:
{{referral source}} — {{main complaints}}

Anamnesis:
{{anamnesis summary}}. Current medication: {{medication}}. Known allergies: {{allergies}}. Family history: {{family history}}. {{lifestyle}}

Clinical examination:
{{clinical findings}}. BMI {{BMI}}.

Additional investigations:
{{investigation results}}

Diagnosis:
{{diagnosis}}

Management:
{{management plan}}. Follow-up planned within {{follow-up timing}}.

Should you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Kind regards,
{{treating physician}}

Note: a placeholder will only be filled in if the information was actually collected during the interaction. If a data point was not captured in the conversation or consultation, the field will remain empty.

Step 6 – Add additional instructions (optional)
  1. Add extra prompting to fine-tune the output

Examples: be concise, write in formal English, avoid medical jargon

Step 7 – Save the template
  1. Click Save in the top right corner

The template is now active and will automatically generate output based on the trigger you set in step 3.


Where do I find the output?

Once a template has been triggered — automatically or manually — you can view the result directly in the conversation detail page.

1. Open the relevant conversation by clicking on it

2. At the top of the page, navigate to the Output tab

3. Here you will find all generated outputs for that conversation

If a template is set to None, it will not trigger automatically. To generate the output manually:

1. Open the Output tab on the conversation detail page

2. Select the desired template from the dropdown

3. Click Generate

items.question: How does automatic sending of doctor-specific questionnaires via the calendar work?
items.excerpt: What is automatic questionnaire sending...

heroImage.alt: New FAQ article

items.body:
What is automatic questionnaire sending?

The system can automatically send the correct questionnaire to the patient based on the doctor and the appointment type.

Once configured, every appointment automatically gets the right questionnaire as long as it is created through the calendar.

Appointments made outside the calendar flow will not trigger automatic sending.

Why is this useful?

  • Each doctor can use their own questionnaire

  • Patients always receive the correct one

  • Less manual work and fewer mistakes

How do I set this up?

The setup consists of 3 steps, and this system only works for appointments scheduled through the calendar (using timeslots and assigned doctors).

Step 1 - Link a questionnaire to a doctor

1. Go to: Settings → Interactions → Conversation Templates

2. Open the questionnaire you want to link

3. In Linked doctors, select one or more doctors

4. Don't forget to 'Save'

If no doctor is linked, the questionnaire is treated as general and applies to all doctors.

Step 2 - Link the questionnaire to an appointment type

1. Go to: Settings → Appointments → Manage Exams

2. Select the modality

3. Click the pencil icon next to the appointment type

4. Select the correct questionnaire(s) in Conversation

5. Don't forget to 'Save'

You can link multiple questionnaires per appointment type.

Step 3 - Link the doctor to a timeslot

1. Go to: Settings → Appointments → Manage Agenda

2. Select the room and timeslot at the top of the page

3. In Doctor/Provider, choose the doctor assigned to that timeslot

4. Don't forget to 'Save'

Automatic questionnaire selection only works when the appointment is scheduled inside a timeslot linked to a doctor.

How does it work in practice?

When an appointment is created via the calendar:

  1. The system checks the timeslot

  2. It identifies which doctor is assigned to that timeslot

  3. It selects the questionnaire linked to both the doctor and the appointment type

  4. That questionnaire is automatically sent to the patient

Important notes

This only works via the calendar

Appointments outside timeslots or created manually without using the calendar flow will not trigger automatic questionnaire sending.

Appointment outside time slots

No automatic questionnaire is assigned. You can still attach one manually.

No doctor linked to a timeslot

The system cannot choose a questionnaire automatically.

No doctor linked to a questionnaire

The questionnaire becomes general and applies to all doctors.

Multiple questionnaires per appointment type

The system selects the questionnaire that matches the doctor assigned to the timeslot.

items.question: How does Smart Scheduling of Conversations work?
items.excerpt: What is Smart Scheduling...

heroImage.alt: New FAQ article

items.body:
What is Smart Scheduling?

Smart Scheduling automatically determines the ideal moment to send a conversation to a patient.

Instead of sending the invitation immediately, the system plans the optimal time based on the consultation date.

Why is this useful?

  • Patients don’t receive their questionnaire too early

  • You can schedule conversations far ahead of time

  • The reminder system works optimally

How do I activate Smart Scheduling?

1. Go to the Smart Scheduling settings

Navigate to: Settings → Interactions → General → Smart Scheduling

2. Turn on the Smart Scheduling toggle

  • On: the system sends conversations automatically at the right moment

  • Off: conversations are sent immediately after creation

3. Set the number of days before the deadline

Enter how many days before the consultation you want results to be completed.

Important: The system always uses a minimum buffer of 7 days.

This ensures:

  • Enough time for the patient to complete the questionnaire

  • Correct reminder scheduling

Examples:

  • Set 0 days → system uses 7 days

  • Set 3 days → system uses 10 days

  • Set 5 days → system uses 12 days

When is the first invitation sent?

The first invitation is automatically sent when the consultation enters the calculated window (your chosen number of days + 7).

Example:

  • Consultation date: 20 November

  • Setting: 3 days

  • First invitation sent on: 10 November

How do reminders work?

After the first email is sent, the usual reminder timings apply:

  • 7 days before the deadline

  • 3 days before the deadline

  • 1 day before the deadline

What if a conversation is created close to the appointment date?

If a conversation is created within the buffer window, it will be sent immediately, even when Smart Scheduling is active.

How can I recognize planned conversations?

Status: “Planned”

The conversation is created but not yet sent. The system is waiting for the optimal moment.

Status: “Pending”

The invitation has been sent and the normal flow continues.

What happens when Smart Scheduling is turned off?

  • All conversations that were still in “Planned” status are sent immediately

  • New conversations are sent directly at creation

When are Smart Scheduled conversations sent?

The system checks every morning at 07:00 and sends all conversations whose scheduled moment has arrived.

items.question: How can I group rooms in the calendar?
items.excerpt: To make your calendar easier to navigate, you can group related rooms together...

heroImage.alt: New FAQ article

items.body:
To make your calendar easier to navigate, you can group related rooms together. Below is an example showing how the rooms RX and Cone Beam CT can be grouped under Medical Imaging.

1. Go to Settings → Appointments → Manage Agenda 
​Here you can see all active time slots for each room




2. Go to the room that you want to put in a room group

All rooms are visible at the top of the page



3. Click the pencil icon next to a room (e.g., RX) to open the Room Detail page.



4. In the Room Detail page, open the Group dropdown. Click Create new to add a new room group.

For example: Create the group “Medical Imaging” by entering the name in all available languages and confirm.



5. After creating the group, select the group in every rooms detail page that you want in the group, it is very important to click save after adding/changing the room group.


For example: We add RX and Cone beam CT to the group medical imaging



6. In the calendar, you will now see all rooms neatly grouped in the bottom-left corner.

items.question: Using Vesalius Scribe as a stand-alone module (no pre-conversation needed)
items.excerpt: This allows you to use the Scribe bot even when you didn’t send a Vesalius conversation before the consultation...

heroImage.alt: New FAQ article

items.body:
This allows you to use the Scribe bot even when you didn’t send a Vesalius conversation before the consultation.

Ideal for walk-ins, urgent consults, or quick follow-ups.

How do you start?

  1. Go to the Interactions dashboard

  2. Click the “+” button → choose Interaction

  3. Select an existing patient (Interaction) or conduct it anonymous (Anonymous interaction)

  4. Click Start recording

  5. Conduct your consultation normally

    1. To get the best results, make sure you use a device with a good microphone, and speak clearly into it.

  6. Click Stop recording when finished

  7. After a few seconds, Scribe will show a structured summary you can copy into the EHR and convert into a clinical letter

    1. By default, the output is generated in the classical SOAP note format — however, you can fully customize this in the settings. For more information about the customisation you can click on this link.

  8. You can still add or delete notes from the generated output simply by typing or removing text

    1. Or you can also reactivate the record button and speak to the system, the agent will automatically add your additional information to the notes.

  9. You can now generate the letter based on the notes you gathered via the generate button:

What do you receive?

  • A structured medical summary

    • The standard output is the classical SOAP note in case you want to customise the output you can simply do this via our settings page -> more information
  • Ability to generate a clean clinical letter instantly from this summary — ready to send to GP / attach to EHR / share with the patient


Why use this?
  • No preparation required
  • Perfect for standard consultations
  • Saves time on note taking + letter writing

items.question: How can I customise the format of the Scribe bot summary?
items.excerpt: You can now fully customise how the Vesalius Scribe bot structures its consultation summaries by using output formats...

heroImage.alt: New FAQ article

items.body:
You can now fully customise how the Vesalius Scribe bot structures its consultation summaries by using output formats. This means you can define exactly which sections appear (e.g., Anamnesis, Clinical Examination, Diagnosis, Treatment Plan) and how they are presented.


Where can I manage output formats?

1. Go to Settings > Interactions > Consultations.


2. At the top of the page, you’ll find all available output formats for your institution.


3. You can use one of these as the default output by clicking on the template and toggling default template


How can i create my own template?


You can start from an existing template and change it, or you create a new template:

1. You click on 'New template + '

2. Give your template a name, so you can easily recognise it (This can be based on different use cases)

3. Describe the purpose of this template

4. Describe the format 
Here the purpose is to describe how you want the output to be, for example in my output I want my output structured as followed:

Subjective:
-  In this part i want all the patient-reported symptoms, history, pain, functional limits, and goals.

Objective:
- In this part i want all the clinician-observed findings: inspection, palpation, ROM, strength, tests, measurements.

Assessment:
- In this part i want all the clinical interpretation: suspected diagnosis, severity, key findings.

Plan:
- In this part i want all the next steps: treatment, exercises, tests, referrals, education, follow-up.

5. Afterwards we can add some additional instructions:

For example:

I want my output to be short and to the point, work with bullet points


I want another template used than the default one?


This is possible through regenerating your current output:


You can change the output template very easily by regenerating in another template:

items.question: How can I prevent the patient initiated chatbot from asking for the appointment date?
items.excerpt: By default, the chatbot will ask the patient for the appointment date when they open a PICO link...

heroImage.alt: New FAQ article

items.body:
By default, the chatbot will ask the patient for the appointment date when they open a PICO link. If you don’t want this question to be asked, you can turn it off.


How to do this:

  1. Go to Settings > Interactions > Unique Link.
  2. In the table, find the sixth column 'Ask for appointment date'.
  3. Switch this option off for the link where you don’t want the chatbot to ask about the appointment date.
  4. You can hover over the info icon next to the label to see a short explanation: “If disabled, the patient will not be asked for the appointment date.”


What happens if I turn it off?

  • The chatbot will skip the question about the appointment date and continue with the rest of the conversation.
  • The appointment date will not be available for use in filter components to easily find the conversation.


Default setting:

  • This option is always on by default for new links, so the patient is asked for their appointment date unless you disable it.

items.question: How can I create a unique link to send a specific questionnaire?
items.excerpt: You can create a PICO link that is tied to one or more specific questionnaires...

heroImage.alt: New FAQ article

items.body:
You can create a PICO link that is tied to one or more specific questionnaires. This ensures the chatbot only uses the selected questionnaires when interacting with the patient.


Steps to create a unique link for specific questionnaires:

  1. Go to Settings > Interactions > Unique Link.
  2. In the overview, look for Column 3: Conversation types.
  3. Click in this column to add one or more questionnaires. The list is organized by type, so you can easily find the right ones. Hover over the type and the underlying questionnaires will show.
  4. Choose one or more questionnaires to link to this specific URL
  5. Changes will be saved after leaving the field.


How does the chatbot use these linked questionnaires?

  • If one questionnaire is linked:
    The chatbot will always use that specific questionnaire when the patient clicks the link.
  • If multiple questionnaires are linked:
    The chatbot will first ask the patient a few questions to understand their context and then choose the most relevant questionnaire from the ones you selected.


What if no questionnaires are linked?

If you don’t link any questionnaires, the chatbot will continue to use all available questionnaires, just like before.

items.question: How can I choose which identification details the patient initiated chatbot asks the patients?
items.excerpt: When a patient starts a conversation through a patient-initiated link, the chatbot begins by asking for identification details (for example, name or date of birth)...

heroImage.alt: New FAQ article

items.body:
When a patient starts a conversation through a patient-initiated link, the chatbot begins by asking for identification details (for example, name or date of birth). These details help you locate the patient in the dashboard.


As an organisation admin, you can decide which identification details are requested. To configure this:

  1. Go to Settings > General > Privacy > Patient Identification.
  2. Use the toggles to enable or disable specific fields (such as name, email, phone number, or date of birth).


This allows you to collect only the information you need while ensuring patients can be easily identified within the platform.

items.question: How can I make a specific patient-initiated conversation anonymous?
items.excerpt: When generating a PICO link for a patient-initiated conversation, you can choose to make this conversation anonymous...

heroImage.alt: New FAQ article

items.body:
When generating a PICO link for a patient-initiated conversation, you can choose to make this conversation anonymous. This means that no personal information will be requested from the patient.


Where can I find this setting?

​Go to: Settings > Interactions > Unique link.


In the table of unique links, you will find an extra option in the 5th column called Anonymous.

Next to the “Anonymous” label, there is an information icon with a tooltip:

“An anonymous intake will not request any identification from the patient.”


What is the effect?

  • No personal details (such as name, email, or phone number) will be asked from the patient.
  • In the overview table, the patient will appear with a system-generated name, for example: Patient 1925.

# Patient initiated chatbot

items.question: How can I create or edit a questionnaire?
items.excerpt: You can manage all questionnaires via Settings > Types of conversations...

heroImage.alt: New FAQ article

items.body:
You can manage all questionnaires via Settings > Types of conversations. This section gives you an overview of all questionnaires currently available on the platform.


To save the questionnaire, please make sure all mandatory fields are completed.


There are two main actions you can take:

1. Edit an existing questionnaire

2. Create a new questionnaire



1. Editing an existing questionnaire


Click on an existing questionnaire to open it.

You can:

  • Modify questions
  • Add new questions
  • Rearrange questions within a group


! Don’t forget to click Save in the bottom-right corner after making changes !



2. Creating a new questionnaire


Click the “New questionnaire” button at the top of the page. And choose 'Create blank template':

You’ll start with an empty template.


First, fill in the general info:

  • Name: This is the title of the questionnaire as it will appear in the system. Choose a clear and recognizable name.
  • Description: Describe when or why this questionnaire should be used. This helps the AI automatically activate the right questionnaire based on the reason for consultation.
  • Intro: The Intro field is used to give context to the patiënt through the chatbot. Here you can add extra information that will be displayed in the first message of the conversation.
  • Pathology: The condition or reason the questionnaire is relevant for. Helps group and apply questionnaires correctly.
  • Linked doctors: This is optional, used to keep structure in your profile
  • Conversation type: The type of questionnaire it is, this is mostly to keep the platform structured
  • Summary generation prompt: Here you can fint tune the output of the conversation type, for example add: Write everything short and in bulletpoints or write everything in full sentences.


To start creating a questionnaire:

Step 1: Create a group


A group is a section used to organize related questions.

Example: General information


Step 2: Add a question


Click “New question” and fill in at least the following two fields:

• Key: A short keyword used to link the answer in the summary (e.g., Type of pain)

• Question: The actual question that will be shown to the patient (e.g., What type of pain is the patient experiencing?)


Optional fields:

• Condition: Show this question only if a condition is met (e.g., If pain score > 7)

• Options: Use this for fixed answer choices (e.g., Sharp pain; Burning pain; Constant pain)


👉 You can add as many groups and questions as needed.

⚠️ Note: The bot will always go through the entire questionnaire from start to finish.

On average, we see questionnaires containing 30–45 questions, and about 80% of patients complete them fully. Keep this in mind when designing longer forms.


Step 3: Finishing up


Once you’re happy with your questionnaire, click Save.

If the save button is not available, check if every mandatory field is filled in!

The questionnaire is now available for use in the bot, under the name you gave it.

items.question: How can I indicate that the summary has been copied to the EHR?
items.excerpt: To make this clearer, we’ve added an icon on the dashboard page that shows whether or not the summary has already been copied to the EHR...

heroImage.alt: New FAQ article

items.body:
To make this clearer, we’ve added an icon on the dashboard page that shows whether or not the summary has already been copied to the EHR.


There are two ways to change the status of this icon:


  • Manually via the conversation detail page
    You can click the icon directly in the conversation detail page. This will change the status to “copied to EHR”.


  • Automatically via settings
    You can also enable automatic status updates by going to:
  1. Settings > Interactions > General
  2. There, toggle “Automatically set status to copied” and click Save.
  3. From now on, every time you click the copy button, the status will automatically update to “copied to EHR”.
  4. You can still manually adjust the status at any time, as described in option 1.

nl.title: Veelgestelde vragen
nl.noResults: Geen resultaten gevonden. Probeer een andere zoekterm of filter.
nl.aboutBody: Op deze pagina vind je alle veelgestelde vragen voor het Vesalius.ai-platform. Als je je antwoord niet kunt vinden, kun je altijd een ticket indienen via het formulier.

items.question: Hoe kan ik mijn output op maat instellen?
items.excerpt: Wat is een outputtemplate...

heroImage.alt: Hoe kan ik mijn output op maat instellen?

items.body: Wat is een outputtemplate? Outputtemplates stellen je in staat om precies te definieren wat Vesalius AI genereert na een interactie met een patiënt. Je configureert de structuur, inhoud en timing en de AI zorgt voor de rest.

items.question: Hoe werkt het automatisch verzenden van arts-specifieke vragenlijsten via de kalender?
items.excerpt: Wat is automatisch vragenlijst verzenden...

heroImage.alt: Hoe werkt het automatisch verzenden van arts-specifieke vragenlijsten via de kalender?

items.body: Wat is automatisch vragenlijst verzenden? Het systeem kan automatisch de juiste vragenlijst naar de patiënt sturen op basis van de arts en het afspraaktype. Eenmaal geconfigureerd, krijgt elke afspraak automatisch de juiste vragenlijst toegewezen.

items.question: Hoe werkt Slimme Planning van Gesprekken?
items.excerpt: Wat is Slimme Planning...

heroImage.alt: Hoe werkt Slimme Planning van Gesprekken?

items.body: Wat is Slimme Planning? Slimme Planning bepaalt automatisch het ideale moment om een gesprek naar een patiënt te sturen. In plaats van de uitnodiging onmiddellijk te versturen, plant het systeem dit op basis van de afspraakdatum.

items.question: Hoe kan ik kamers in de kalender groeperen?
items.excerpt: Om uw kalender gemakkelijker te navigeren, kunt u gerelateerde kamers samenvoegen...

heroImage.alt: Hoe kan ik kamers in de kalender groeperen?

items.body: Om uw kalender gemakkelijker te navigeren, kunt u gerelateerde kamers samenvoegen. Hieronder is een voorbeeld dat laat zien hoe de kamers RX en Cone Beam CT kunnen worden gegroepeerd onder Medische Beeldvorming.

items.question: Vesalius Scribe gebruiken als een op zichzelf staande module (geen voorafgaande conversatie nodig)
items.excerpt: Dit stelt je in staat om de Scribe-bot te gebruiken, zelfs als je geen Vesaliusgesprek hebt gestuurd voor de consultatie...

heroImage.alt: Vesalius Scribe gebruiken als een op zichzelf staande module (geen voorafgaande conversatie nodig)

items.body: Dit stelt je in staat om de Scribe-bot te gebruiken, zelfs als je geen Vesaliusgesprek hebt gestuurd voor de consultatie. Ideaal voor binnenlopers, dringende consulten of snelle opvolgingen. Ga naar de Intake pagina om te starten.

items.question: Hoe kan ik het formaat van de samenvatting van de Scribe-bot aanpassen?
items.excerpt: Je kunt nu volledig aanpassen hoe de Vesalius Scribe-bot zijn consultatiesamenvattingen structureert door gebruik te maken van uitvoerformaten...

heroImage.alt: Hoe kan ik het formaat van de samenvatting van de Scribe-bot aanpassen?

items.body: Je kunt nu volledig aanpassen hoe de Vesalius Scribe-bot zijn consultatiesamenvattingen structureert door gebruik te maken van uitvoerformaten. Dit betekent dat je precies kunt definieren welke secties verschijnen.

items.question: Hoe kan ik voorkomen dat de door de patiënt geinitieerde chatbot vraagt naar de afspraakdatum?
items.excerpt: Standaard zal de chatbot de patiënt vragen naar de afspraakdatum wanneer ze een PICO-link openen...

heroImage.alt: Hoe kan ik voorkomen dat de door de patiënt geinitieerde chatbot vraagt naar de afspraakdatum?

items.body: Standaard zal de chatbot de patiënt vragen naar de afspraakdatum wanneer ze een PICO-link openen. Als je niet wilt dat deze vraag wordt gesteld, kun je deze uitschakelen in de instellingen.

items.question: Hoe kan ik een unieke link maken om een specifieke vragenlijst te verzenden?
items.excerpt: Je kunt een PICO-link maken die is gekoppeld aan een of meer specifieke vragenlijsten...

heroImage.alt: Hoe kan ik een unieke link maken om een specifieke vragenlijst te verzenden?

items.body: Je kunt een PICO-link maken die is gekoppeld aan een of meer specifieke vragenlijsten. Dit zorgt ervoor dat de chatbot alleen de geselecteerde vragenlijsten gebruikt bij interactie met de patiënt.

items.question: Hoe kan ik kiezen welke identificatiegegevens de door de patiënt geinitieerde chatbot aan de patiënten vraagt?
items.excerpt: Wanneer een patiënt een gesprek begint via een door de patiënt geinitieerde link, begint de chatbot met het vragen naar identificatiegegevens...

heroImage.alt: Hoe kan ik kiezen welke identificatiegegevens de door de patiënt geinitieerde chatbot aan de patiënten vraagt?

items.body: Wanneer een patiënt een gesprek begint via een door de patiënt geinitieerde link, begint de chatbot met het vragen naar identificatiegegevens. Deze gegevens helpen je de patiënt te identificeren.

items.question: Hoe kan ik een specifiek door de patiënt geinitieerd gesprek anoniem maken?
items.excerpt: Bij het genereren van een PICO-link voor een door de patiënt geinitieerd gesprek, kun je ervoor kiezen om dit gesprek anoniem te maken...

heroImage.alt: Hoe kan ik een specifiek door de patiënt geinitieerd gesprek anoniem maken?

items.body: Bij het genereren van een PICO-link voor een door de patiënt geinitieerd gesprek, kun je ervoor kiezen om dit gesprek anoniem te maken. Dit betekent dat er geen persoonlijke informatie van de patiënt zal worden gevraagd.

items.question: Hoe kan ik een vragenlijst aanmaken of bewerken?
items.excerpt: Je kunt alle vragenlijsten beheren via Instellingen > Soorten gesprekken...

heroImage.alt: Hoe kan ik een vragenlijst aanmaken of bewerken?

items.body: Je kunt alle vragenlijsten beheren via Instellingen > Soorten gesprekken. Deze sectie geeft je een overzicht van alle vragenlijsten die momenteel beschikbaar zijn op het platform.

items.question: Hoe kan ik aangeven dat de samenvatting naar het EPD is gekopieerd?
items.excerpt: Om dit duidelijker te maken, hebben we een pictogram op de dashboardpagina toegevoegd dat aangeeft of de samenvatting al dan niet naar het EPD is gekopieerd...

heroImage.alt: Hoe kan ik aangeven dat de samenvatting naar het EPD is gekopieerd?

items.body: Om dit duidelijker te maken, hebben we een pictogram op de dashboardpagina toegevoegd dat aangeeft of de samenvatting al dan niet naar het EPD is gekopieerd. Je kunt dit handmatig wijzigen of automatisch instellen.

fr.title: Questions frequentes
fr.noResults: Aucun résultat. Essayez un autre mot-clé ou un autre filtre.
fr.aboutBody: Vous trouverez ici les principales questions sur la plateforme Vesalius.ai. Si vous ne trouvez pas ce que vous cherchez, notre équipe peut vous répondre via le formulaire de contact.

items.question: Comment fonctionne l'envoi automatique de questionnaires spécifiques au médecin via le calendrier ?
items.excerpt: Dans les paramètres du calendrier, vous pouvez associer un questionnaire à un praticien ou à un type de rendez-vous...

heroImage.alt: Comment fonctionne l'envoi automatique de questionnaires spécifiques au médecin via le calendrier ?

items.body: Dans les paramètres du calendrier, vous pouvez associer un questionnaire à un praticien ou à un type de rendez-vous. Dès qu'un créneau correspondant est créé, Vesalius planifie automatiquement l'envoi du questionnaire au moment prévu.

items.question: Comment fonctionne la planification intelligente des conversations ?
items.excerpt: Vesalius combine les règles que vous définissez avec le contexte du patient pour déterminer quand lancer une conversation, quand relancer et quand arrêter automatiquement le scénario.

heroImage.alt: Comment fonctionne la planification intelligente des conversations ?

items.body: Vesalius combine les règles que vous définissez avec le contexte du patient pour déterminer quand lancer une conversation, quand relancer et quand arrêter automatiquement le scénario.

items.question: Comment regrouper des salles dans le calendrier ?
items.excerpt: Créez un groupe de salles dans les paramètres du planning puis assignez-y les ressources concernées...

heroImage.alt: Comment regrouper des salles dans le calendrier ?

items.body: Créez un groupe de salles dans les paramètres du planning puis assignez-y les ressources concernées. Vous pourrez ensuite filtrer, afficher ou répartir les rendez-vous à l'échelle du groupe.

items.question: Peut-on utiliser Vesalius Scribe comme module autonome, sans pre-conversation ?
items.excerpt: Il n'est pas nécessaire d'activer la pré-consultation pour utiliser Scribe...

heroImage.alt: Peut-on utiliser Vesalius Scribe comme module autonome, sans pre-conversation ?

items.body: Il n'est pas nécessaire d'activer la pré-consultation pour utiliser Scribe. Vous pouvez lancer l'enregistrement ambiant pendant la consultation et récupérer ensuite la note clinique générée.

items.question: Comment personnaliser le format de la synthèse Scribe ?
items.excerpt: Les modèles permettent de définir la structure souhaitée, les rubriques obligatoires et le ton rédactionnel...

heroImage.alt: Comment personnaliser le format de la synthèse Scribe ?

items.body: Les modèles permettent de définir la structure souhaitée, les rubriques obligatoires et le ton rédactionnel. Vous pouvez ainsi obtenir une synthèse proche de vos habitudes de documentation.

items.question: Comment éviter que le chatbot initié par le patient demande la date du rendez-vous ?
items.excerpt: Dans les paramètres du scénario, désactivez la question liée à la date de rendez-vous ou remplacez-la par un autre identifiant...

heroImage.alt: Comment éviter que le chatbot initié par le patient demande la date du rendez-vous ?

items.body: Dans les paramètres du scénario, désactivez la question liée à la date de rendez-vous ou remplacez-la par un autre identifiant. Le parcours restera fluide pour le patient tout en conservant le bon contexte côté équipe.

items.question: Comment créer un lien unique pour envoyer un questionnaire précis ?
items.excerpt: Depuis le questionnaire concerné, générez un lien dédié puis partagez-le par e-mail, SMS ou tout autre canal...

heroImage.alt: Comment créer un lien unique pour envoyer un questionnaire précis ?

items.body: Depuis le questionnaire concerné, générez un lien dédié puis partagez-le par e-mail, SMS ou tout autre canal. Le patient arrive directement dans le bon flux, sans étape inutile.

items.question: Comment choisir quelles informations d'identification le chatbot initié par le patient doit demander ?
items.excerpt: Dans le paramétrage du chatbot, sélectionnez les champs obligatoires comme le nom, la date de naissance ou le numéro de dossier...

heroImage.alt: Comment choisir quelles informations d'identification le chatbot initié par le patient doit demander ?

items.body: Dans le paramétrage du chatbot, sélectionnez les champs obligatoires comme le nom, la date de naissance ou le numéro de dossier. Vesalius utilisera ensuite uniquement ces informations pour l'identification.

items.question: Comment créer ou modifier un questionnaire ?
items.excerpt: Vous pouvez ajouter des questions, choisir les types de réponses, définir des conditions d'affichage et prévisualiser le parcours avant publication...

heroImage.alt: Comment créer ou modifier un questionnaire ?

items.body: Vous pouvez ajouter des questions, choisir les types de réponses, définir des conditions d'affichage et prévisualiser le parcours avant publication. Les modifications sont ensuite appliquées au flux concerné.

items.question: Comment indiquer que la synthèse a déjà été copiée dans le DMI ?
items.excerpt: Une fois la synthèse transférée dans le DMI, vous pouvez la marquer comme traitée afin d'éviter les doublons et de garder une vision claire de ce qui reste à faire.

heroImage.alt: Comment indiquer que la synthèse a déjà été copiée dans le DMI ?

items.body: Une fois la synthèse transférée dans le DMI, vous pouvez la marquer comme traitée afin d'éviter les doublons et de garder une vision claire de ce qui reste à faire.
